title: hieracium cordifolium subsp. neocerinthe
intro: Hieracium cordifolium subsp. neocerinthe is a subspecies of the hawkweed plant, a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Hieracium cordifolium subsp. neocerinthe include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions.
